description_long: This object consists of three wooden directional signs, each mounted on a vertical wooden post. The signs have a rustic, hand-crafted appearance, with visible wood grain and irregular, slightly jagged edges. Each signboard is shaped like an arrow, pointing in different directions, and the wood texture is detailed with natural knots and lines. The posts are thick and sturdy, suggesting durability for outdoor use. There is no visible text or symbols on the signboards, leaving them blank for custom labeling. The overall design is reminiscent of signage found in parks, trails, or rustic urban settings.
description: A set of three blank, rustic wooden directional arrow signs on sturdy posts, featuring detailed wood grain and natural textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three arrow-shaped wooden signs with clear wood grain and no text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the signboards and the depth of the posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the arrow signs and the supporting posts, with wood texture visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the signboards and the alignment of the posts.
attribute_location_context: urban park, trail entrance, or pedestrian pathway
